scripts.tauri:build:macos-app: npm run prepare-sidecar && bash ./scripts/run-tauri.sh build --bundles app
scripts.tauri:build:macos-dmg: npm run prepare-sidecar && bash ./scripts/run-tauri.sh build --bundles dmg
scripts.tauri:build:windows: npm run prepare-sidecar && bash ./scripts/run-tauri.sh build --bundles nsis
scripts.tauri:build:linux: npm run prepare-sidecar && bash ./scripts/run-tauri.sh build --bundles appimage
